creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Will commit with RUN_DEPENDS=    ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}libopenshot>=0.3.0:multimedia/libopenshot@${PY_FLAVOR}

to avoid using old 0.2.7 by any chance.

libopenshot:
---
Part of the OpenShot Video Editor v3.0.0 Release
Bumping version to 0.3.0, SO 23 (minimum libopenshot-audio dependency to 0.3.0)
(...)
